dbSupport.problem: Database downtime costs enterprises thousands of dollars per minute. Without round-the-clock monitoring, critical issues can go undetected until they cause major outages.
dbSupport.solution: Our 24/7 database support team provides proactive monitoring, instant incident response, and continuous optimization to keep your databases running at peak performance.

postgresql.problem: Many organizations struggle with PostgreSQL deployment, missing out on its full potential due to improper configuration, lack of high availability, and suboptimal performance.
postgresql.solution: We provide end-to-end PostgreSQL services — from initial deployment and configuration to high-availability setup, performance tuning, and ongoing maintenance.

dwh.problem: Organizations accumulate vast amounts of data across multiple systems, but struggle to unify and analyze it effectively for strategic decision-making.
dwh.solution: We design and build enterprise data warehouses and data lakes that integrate data from all your sources into a single, queryable platform for analytics and reporting.
dwh.f2: Data lake implementation with Apache technologies

nosql.problem: NoSQL databases require specialized expertise for cluster management, data modeling, and performance optimization that differs significantly from traditional RDBMS.
nosql.solution: Our NoSQL experts handle deployment, scaling, performance tuning, and operational management of MongoDB, Cassandra, HBase, and other NoSQL platforms.

migration.problem: Database migrations carry significant risk — data loss, extended downtime, and application compatibility issues can cripple business operations.
migration.solution: We execute safe, methodical database migrations with minimal downtime, handling everything from assessment and planning to execution and post-migration validation.

training.problem: In-house database teams often lack specialized skills needed to manage modern database platforms effectively, leading to suboptimal performance and security gaps.
training.solution: Our professional training programs equip your DBAs with hands-on skills across Oracle, PostgreSQL, MS-SQL, and NoSQL platforms, customized to your organization's needs.
training.f1: Customized curriculum for your tech stack

security.problem: Database breaches can expose sensitive data, result in regulatory fines, and damage organizational reputation. Many databases have undetected security vulnerabilities.
security.solution: We provide comprehensive database security services including audits, encryption, access control, masking, and compliance implementation to protect your critical data.

aiml.problem: Organizations want to leverage AI and machine learning but lack the scalable data infrastructure, MLOps practices, and domain expertise needed to move AI from pilot to production.
aiml.solution: We deliver end-to-end machine learning capabilities — from AI strategy and use-case engineering to MLOps, production deployment, and domain-specific applied AI solutions.
aiml.f7: Analytical AI Agents for Banking & Public Finance

platform.problem: Traditional data infrastructure is fragmented, expensive, and difficult to scale. Organizations need a unified platform that handles storage, processing, and analytics.
platform.solution: As official IOMETE partners, we deploy and configure fully managed data lakehouse infrastructure with scalable compute, secure storage, and built-in analytics capabilities.
platform.f3: Secure data storage with Apache Iceberg
platform.f4: Built-in SQL analytics and Spark processing

etl.problem: Legacy ETL processes are slow, brittle, and expensive to maintain. Modern data volumes require scalable, reliable pipelines that can handle diverse data sources.
etl.solution: We design and build production-grade ETL/ELT pipelines using Apache Spark, dbt, and IOMETE that transform data from any source reliably and efficiently.

bi.problem: Decision-makers lack timely access to actionable data insights. Disconnected reports and manual processes delay critical business decisions.
bi.solution: We integrate your data platform with leading BI tools to create real-time dashboards, automated reports, and self-service analytics for your entire organization.

governance.problem: Without proper governance, databases become inconsistent, non-compliant, and vulnerable. Change management gaps lead to outages and audit failures.
governance.solution: We implement enterprise-grade database governance frameworks covering change management, compliance, backup strategies, and security policies across your organization.
